allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{n='ProcessName';e={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName}})

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" } catch { "Could not kill PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)" } } } else { "Port 5000 free" })
